heading: Date of transfer
label: 2383 Date of transfer
text: Transfers of municipal installations may be made at any time, not later than five years after , in the case of Oak Ridge and Richland, or, in the case of Los Alamos, not later than .August 4, 1955June 30, 1998
notes: Amendments1996— substituted “not later than ” for “not later than five years after the date it is included within this chapter”.Pub.
